title: Founder-Market Fit
promise: Strategic right-to-win assessment for a founding team in a specific market.
audience: Founders, co-founders, venture studios, accelerators, and investors screening early-stage teams
description: Strategic fit assessment across Domain Edge, Customer Access, Credibility & Assets, Long-Term Pull & Learning. Four-dimensional radar result, balanced index, level label, strongest-dimension archetype, weakest-dimension 30-day action.
ogDescription: Strategic right-to-win assessment for a founding team in a specific market.
